title: PR Token Spend Estimate
description: Per-PR estimated agent token spend, produced by .github/workflows/pr-token-spend.yml. One file per merged PR head SHA in state/quality/ai-costs/<sha>.json. Consumed by the AI Contributors card at /test#dev/summary.

run_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the workflow generated this estimate.

name.description: Canonical agent id (claude, codex, mercury, antigravity, junie, ...)

diff_lines.description: Sum of insertions + deletions across this agent's commits.

est_tokens.description: Estimated total tokens (input + output). Heuristic; not measured.

est_cost_usd.description: Estimated cost in USD. Estimate only; cross-check provider billing dashboards for ground truth.

threshold_alert_usd.description: If set and total_est_cost_usd exceeds this value, the workflow opens an alert issue. Default null = disabled.

pricing_source.description: Path + as-of date for the pricing snapshot used.

pricing_stale_warning.description: Populated when pricing.json _as_of is older than the staleness threshold (90d).
